meaning: n.(苏格兰高地及爱尔兰的Gelt人)盖尔人
examples: Arsenal are preparing to sell left-back Gael Clichy.
Their other recent signings, David Ngog and gael Kakuta, started on the bench.
Gael Clichy's defensive covering and closing down of his opponent Valencia was excellent.
With Gael Clichy also out, Armand Traore could deputise at left-back when Arsenal host Chelsea on Sunday.
Gael Givet put Rovers ahead with a fierce drive from the edge of the area.
